        sq_nonneg (x + y + 1)]
    }) <;>
  (try
    {
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x + y), sq_nonneg (x - y), sq_nonneg (|x| - 1),
        sq_nonneg (|x| + 1), sq_nonneg (|y| - |x|), sq_nonneg (|y| + |x|),
        abs_nonneg x, abs_nonneg y, abs_mul_abs_self x, abs_mul_abs_self y]
    })
